name: Lundin Gold Inc.
description: Lundin Gold Inc. is a Canadian mining company that owns and operates the Fruta del Norte gold mine in southeast Ecuador. Fruta del Norte is one of the highest-grade gold mines in the world and is the company's flagship asset. Lundin Gold is committed to responsible mining, focusing on health and safety, environmental stewardship, and community development. The company is headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, and is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange and Nasdaq Stockholm, providing investors with exposure to high-margin gold production in a developing mining jurisdiction.
